shot_type_and_framing: close-up shot, subject centered and filling the mid-lower two thirds of the vertical frame
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a 85mm focal length style, shallow depth of field softly blurring the background
environment_description: softly textured beige fabric surface beneath a smooth off-white marble tray with subtle veining
subject_description: rectangular off-white marble tray with rounded edges, featuring a gold metallic decorative branch with leaves and an eight-pointed star in the center
motion_behavior: static subject with natural subtle depth focus shift due to camera push-in
overall_cinematic_tone: grounded, premium, minimalist, filmic with emphasis on texture and material quality
